targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  s.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.stocks s ON s.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'stock' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  s.id IN (
    SELECT s2.id 
    FROM market_data.stocks s2 
    ORDER BY s2.market_cap DESC
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  c.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.cryptocurrencies c ON c.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'crypto' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  c.id IN (
    SELECT c2.id 
    FROM market_data.cryptocurrencies c2 
    ORDER BY c2.market_cap DESC
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  fp.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.forex_pairs fp ON fp.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'forex' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  fp.id IN (
    SELECT fp2.id 
    FROM market_data.forex_pairs fp2 
    ORDER BY fp2.is_major DESC, fp2.id
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  cm.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.commodities cm ON cm.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'commodity' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  cm.id IN (
    SELECT cm2.id 
    FROM market_data.commodities cm2 
    ORDER BY cm2.id
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

WITH latest_stock_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'stock' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  s.symbol,
  s.company_name as name,
  ROUND(lsp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lsp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lsp.current_price - lsp.prev_price) / lsp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  s.market_cap / 1000000000 as market_cap_billions
FROM latest_stock_prices lsp
JOIN market_data.stocks s ON s.id = lsp.asset_id
ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_crypto_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'crypto' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  c.symbol,
  c.name,
  ROUND(lcp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lcp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lcp.current_price - lcp.prev_price) / lcp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  c.market_cap / 1000000000 as market_cap_billions
FROM latest_crypto_prices lcp
JOIN market_data.cryptocurrencies c ON c.id = lcp.asset_id
ORDER BY c.market_cap DESC
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_forex_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'forex' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  fp.symbol,
  CONCAT(fp.base_currency, '/', fp.quote_currency) as pair,
  ROUND(lfp.current_price::numeric, 6) as current_rate,
  ROUND(lfp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lfp.current_price - lfp.prev_price) / lfp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 4) as change_percent,
  CASE WHEN fp.is_major THEN 'Major' ELSE 'Minor' END as pair_type
FROM latest_forex_prices lfp
JOIN market_data.forex_pairs fp ON fp.id = lfp.asset_id
ORDER BY fp.is_major DESC, fp.id
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_commodity_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'commodity' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  cm.symbol,
  cm.name,
  ROUND(lcp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lcp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lcp.current_price - lcp.prev_price) / lcp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  cm.asset_class
FROM latest_commodity_prices lcp
JOIN market_data.commodities cm ON cm.id = lcp.asset_id
ORDER BY cm.id
LIMIT 30
